# Logix Contact UK

> Logix Contact is a premier software development and digital marketing agency in the UK, building custom websites, mobile apps, desktop software, and data-driven marketing strategies for businesses ready to grow.

## Contact Information
- **Address**: Suite 28, Nouvelle Building, 52 Sutton Court Road, Sutton, England, SM1 4SL
- **Phone**: +44 7440 147953
- **Email**: info@logixcontact.co.uk

## Our Core Services

### 💻 App Development
- **Frontend Development**: Building responsive and interactive user interfaces.
- **Backend Engineering**: Developing robust server-side logic and databases.
- **App Innovation**: Creating cutting-edge mobile and web applications.

### 🌐 Web Development
- **Next-Level Experiences**: Crafting high-performance, user-centric websites.
- **MERN | MEAN Power**: Full-stack development using modern JavaScript frameworks.
- **PHP Back-End Solutions**: Developing dynamic and scalable web applications.

### 🖥️ Desktop Development
- **Robust Apps with .NET**: Building powerful and secure Windows desktop applications.
- **Unity Immersion**: Developing interactive 2D and 3D content and games.

### 📈 SEO Services
- **SEO Audits and Analysis**: In-depth technical and content audits to identify growth opportunities.
- **Keyword Research**: Strategic keyword targeting to attract the right audience.

### 🎯 Digital Marketing Strategy
- **Brand Presence**: Elevating your brand's visibility and engagement across digital channels.

### 🎨 UI/UX Design
- **Figma Mastery**: Designing intuitive and beautiful interfaces.
- **Adobe XD & Illustrator Mastery**: Creating high-fidelity prototypes and graphics.
- **Rive Animation Magic**: Bringing interfaces to life with interactive animations.

### 🔗 View all capabilities
- [View our complete service portfolio](https://logixcontact.co.uk/services)

## Why Choose Us
- **Proven UK expertise** – We understand local market nuances, GDPR compliance, and customer expectations.
- **Tailored solutions** – We avoid off-the-shelf templates, building exactly what your business needs.
- **End-to-end service** – From development to SEO, content, and paid ads, we provide a holistic approach.
- **Transparent pricing** – Fixed quotes with no hidden fees.
- **Ongoing support** – We offer maintenance, security updates, and 24/7 emergency assistance.

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

### What is your core development process?
Our end-to-end process includes discovery, UI/UX design (using Figma, Adobe XD, etc.), development (Frontend, Backend, or .NET), and deployment.

### Which technologies do you specialize in?
We specialize in the MERN (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js) and MEAN (MongoDB, Express.js, Angular, Node.js) stacks, PHP for back-end solutions, and .NET for robust desktop applications.

### Do you offer digital marketing services?
Yes. Beyond development, we also provide SEO (audits, keyword research), a digital marketing strategy focused on brand presence, and UI/UX design services.

### How much does a website or app cost?
A standard business website starts from **£2,000**. An e-commerce store typically ranges from **£5,000 to £15,000**. Pricing for custom apps and software is quoted individually based on your requirements.

### How long does a project take?
A simple website takes **3–5 weeks**. E-commerce and custom development projects normally take **8–12 weeks**, which includes design, development, testing, and training.

- [About Us](https://logixcontact.co.uk/about): Learn our story and mission.
- [Contact Us](https://logixcontact.co.uk/contact): Get in touch for a free quote.
